examples: I left the room, and the dog bounded after.

definitions.text: Subsequently to; following in time; later than.
examples: We had a few beers after the game.
The time is a quarter after eight.

definitions.text: Subsequently to and as a result of.
examples: After your bad behaviour, you will be punished.
I’m not putting you in charge again after the last disaster.

definitions.text: Signifies that the action of the clause it starts takes place before the action of the other clause.
examples: The show ends after the fat lady sings.
After we had decided to call it a day, I went home.

definitions.text: Later; second (of two); next, following, subsequent
At or towards the stern of a ship or the rear of an aircraft.
examples: The after gun is mounted aft.
The after gun is abaft the forward gun.

definitions.text: Of before-and-after images: the one that shows the difference after a specified treatment.
